original_image_tags: A single page showing the reverse side of a document, featuring multiple blue ink "RECEIVED" stamps from the U.S. Department of Justice / FBI, applied in various orientations. The paper has two hole-punch marks at the top.

elements.description: Multiple overlapping blue U.S. Department of Justice / FBI receipt stamps with dates (OCT 19, OCT 20), times (e.g., 4 02 PM, 10 51 AM, 1 06 PM), and names (LADD, TOLSON, MICHIE, BELMONT, LIAISON, DIRECTOR).

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content (multiple blue ink 'RECEIVED' stamps from the U.S. Department of Justice / FBI) and do not contradict each other, but Description B adds specific details (dates, times, and names) not present in Description A.
